question: Does the output contain exactly three images in the specified sequence: (1) full-body shot, (2) macro fabric close-up, and (3) flat-lay?
Does the first image depict a full-body shot of a model wearing a dark green pajama set in a French vintage-style bedroom?
Does the first image feature distinct striped shadow patterns consistent with morning sunlight streaming through venetian blinds?
Are the lighting and shadow effects in the first image realistic (e.g., shadows wrap naturally around the model and environment rather than appearing as flat overlays)?
Does the second image provide a macro close-up that clearly showcases the texture, luster (sheen), and drape of the silk fabric?
Does the third image show the complete pajama set (top and bottom) arranged as a flat-lay on a pure white background?
Is the dark green color of the pajama set consistent across all three images (full-body, macro, and flat-lay)?
Does the pajama set design maintain subject consistency across the three different scales (full-body, macro, flat-lay) without changing into a different product style?
Are all generated images free from obvious AI artifacts (e.g., distorted hands, extra limbs, warped object boundaries, or incoherent geometry)?
Is the marketing copy written in a premium, persuasive tone suitable for luxury e-commerce sleepwear?
Is the text formatted with appropriate structure for a product page (e.g., using headings, bullet points, or concise paragraphs rather than dense walls of text)?
Is the content structured in an interleaved format with text placed between the images?
Does the text adjacent to the macro shot specifically discuss the fabric's material properties (e.g., texture, quality, feel)?
Does the text adjacent to the full-body shot relate to the lifestyle, fit, or mood depicted in the image?
